approach: Reshape the Home Tool into a clean settings-row stack with the documented ndt-select position control, fix sidebar-mode tooltip direction with a tooltipDirection mapping, settle the close-button hover, curate a 2-link footer ([Docs, Feedback]), and tighten App Features list rhythm at the boundaries.
last_action: PR #52 opened — feat(toolbar): redesign home tool with settings rows + chrome polish
decisions: Used `.position-segmented` as the new class name (rather than reusing `.position-selector`) to avoid CSS-name overlap with the deleted full-width style.

Added `flex-wrap: wrap; row-gap: 2px` to `.position-segmented` so the strip degrades to two rows instead of overflowing if the 6 abbreviated keys exceed the right slot at narrow window widths — graceful degradation instead of triggering the ndt-select fallback prematurely.
Added marker class `.instruction--first-data` on the Export row (T001) for the Layout/Data divider in T002 — robust against row reordering vs. nth-of-type.
Used parameterized `it.each` for the four cardinal positions in the spec to keep the test file tight while exercising every cardinal.

Post-screenshot review: replaced the 6-key segmented strip with the documented ndt-select fallback (T006) because the strip's natural width collapsed the label column to ~50px in the medium-size window; ndt-select's 120px min-width restores label breathing room.
Capitalized position labels in the dropdown (Top/Bottom/Left/Right/Sidebar L/Sidebar R) — easier to scan than the lowercase strip labels.
Footer URL switched to /issues/new/choose so GitHub presents the issue-template picker (Bug report or Feature request) instead of forcing the user to pre-categorize.

T007 fixes shared list primitives (list.component.scss + list-group.component.scss), so the rhythm benefit propagates to Feature Flags / Permissions / Presets — a one-line fix that improves four tools at once.

concerns.note: R006 default-mode header alignment is unverified visually (no browser session in this auto run); reviewer should confirm at CP1 that controls don't feel high above multi-line title blocks.

list-group .content margin-top deletion changes group-header→items spacing in EVERY list-using tool (Feature Flags, App Features, Permissions, Presets). User saw the change on App Features only; reviewer should sanity-check the other three tools don't feel cramped now.

T001.did: Replaced the .position-selector segmented bar with a .instruction row + compact .position-segmented control inside .instruction__control; trimmed links to [Docs, Bug report]; removed unused TOOLBAR_POSITIONS import; introduced positionItems with abbreviated labels and ◧/◨ glyphs for sidebars.

T002.did: Deleted .position-selector block; added .position-segmented compact strip styles with focus-visible + active states; added .instruction--first-data divider above the Export row; flipped .footer-links from space-between → flex-start with gap=md.

T003.did: Added readonly tooltipDirection computed mapping sidebar-left → 'left', sidebar-right → 'right', cardinals pass-through; switched host class binding to use tooltipDirection() — no SCSS changes since existing cardinal :host(.tooltip-position-left)/(right) rules already point inward.

T004.did: Option A applied: deleted .control--close:hover { background: var(--ndt-hover-danger); } override so close inherits sibling .control:hover neutral treatment. R006 default-mode header pass: no SCSS edit (task notes it may be no-op) — defer visual confirmation to CP1.
concerns: R006 default-mode header alignment unverified visually — reviewer should confirm at CP1.

T005.did: Created tool-button.component.spec.ts with TestBed setup mocking ToolbarStateService (activeToolId/isVisible/theme signals); 6 Jest cases — 2 sidebar mappings (sidebar-left → 'left', sidebar-right → 'right') verifying both tooltipDirection() return value and host classList; 4 cardinal pass-through cases via it.each. All pass; full 401-test library suite green.

T006.did: Swapped .position-segmented strip for <ndt-select> bound to state.position() via [value]+(valueChange). Imported ToolbarSelectComponent + SelectOption; renamed positionItems → positionOptions (Title-Cased labels); deleted .position-segmented SCSS block (~30 lines). onPositionChange retained as the binding sink with $any cast for the string→ToolbarPosition boundary.

T007.did: list.component.scss: added padding-top: var(--ndt-spacing-sm) to .list-container so filter→list = 6px (matches header→filter). list-group.component.scss: deleted margin-top: var(--ndt-spacing-xs) from .content so group-header→items = 4px (host gap is single source of truth). Affects all list-using tools — Feature Flags, App Features, Permissions, Presets.
concerns: Spacing change applies to all list-using tools (Feature Flags / Permissions / Presets / App Features); user only audited App Features. Visual regression check needed on the other three.

T008.did: Replaced { icon: 'bug', label: 'Bug report', url: .../issues } with { icon: 'lightbulb', label: 'Feedback', url: .../issues/new/choose } in the home-tool links array. Final footer: Docs · Feedback. URL routes through GitHub's issue-template chooser so users pick Bug vs Feature when filing.

specify.key_finding: Tooltip-position mapping in toolbar-tool.component.ts:92-93 sends sidebar-mode tooltips toward the viewport edge (off-screen) — root cause of the sidebar tooltip complaint.

plan.approach_summary: Reshape the Home Tool into a clean settings-row stack with a compact segmented position control, fix sidebar-mode tooltip direction with a tooltipDirection mapping, settle the close-button hover, and curate a 2-link footer.
risks: Segmented-control width in narrow windows (320px); mitigation = ndt-select fallback already named in modify entry.
Close-button hover muscle memory: neutral vs soft danger-tint — pick at tasks.
tooltipDirection mapping must remain the only consumer of the tooltip-position-* class; verify with grep.

edits_applied: position control flipped from ndt-select default to compact segmented control with select fallback
.footer-links justify-content space-between -> flex-start with gap to keep 2 links tight
R006 header pass refocused on default-mode align-items: flex-start (compact already centered)
R004 close-button hover surfaced as A (neutral) / B (soft 8% danger tint) decision before tasks
consolidated two window.component.scss entries into one with two sub-bullets
added explicit 'cardinal left/right already correct' note to Approach

decisions_settled: close-button hover: option A (neutral parity) — delete .control--close:hover override; option B (soft 8% danger tint) recorded as fallback inside T004
position control: compact segmented control as primary path; ndt-select as documented fallback if 6-key strip overflows narrow widths
